scripts.build-dev: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node generate-build-info.js && ng build --configuration development && node inject-build-hash.js
scripts.build-test: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node generate-build-info.js && ng build --configuration development --deploy-url /htdocs/actinver_drive/dist/actinver_spine/ --base-href /htdocs/actinver_drive/dist/actinver_spine/ && node inject-build-hash.js
scripts.build-qa: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node generate-build-info.js && ng build --configuration qa && node inject-build-hash.js
scripts.build-pre: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node generate-build-info.js && ng build --configuration pre && node inject-build-hash.js
scripts.build-prod: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node generate-build-info.js && ng build --configuration production && node inject-build-hash.js
